ARC-000-STRAT-v1.0.title: Architecture Strategy: ibn-core (RFC 9315 / TMF921 Intent-Based Networking)
ARC-000-STRAT-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), Vpnet Commercial & Security
controlFields.Business Challenge: Malaysian operators need standards-based, low-lock-in intent automation; autonomous AI on live national infrastructure must be provably safe before network teams and regulators accept it
controlFields.Strategic Opportunity: Establish ibn-core as the reference RFC 9315 / TMF921 production implementation and win operator procurement on verifiable conformance plus a trustworthy AI-native differentiator
controlFields.Expected Return: First recognised SI revenue on a referenceable production engagement by Q4 2026; pipeline acceleration thereafter (quantified in SOBC)
controlFields.Risk Appetite: MEDIUM — bold on standards leadership and AI-native operation; conservative on autonomy blast-radius, the open-core seam, and regulated-data handling (security and seam integrity are non-negotiable)
controlFields.Total Investment Envelope: To be quantified in the SOBC (RM, 2-year horizon)
controlFields.CAPEX / OPEX Split: To be determined in the SOBC

ARC-001-AIGE-v1.0.title: National AI Governance & Ethics (AIGE) Assessment
ARC-001-AIGE-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), operator Compliance Officers, operator Network Engineering
controlFields.Assessed AI risk tier: **HIGH impact, Medium residual.** Recommend companion `/arckit:ai-playbook` and `/arckit:atrs` (transparency record) before live operator go-live (G-2).
controlFields.Fairness: Domain is technical network-resource provisioning, not decisions about individuals — low intrinsic discrimination surface. Deterministic TMF921 schema constrains agent output; intent translation is auditable per-decision via telemetry. No automated decisions are made *about persons* (no eligibility/credit/profiling).
controlFields.Reliability, Safety & Control: **Phased autonomy by blast radius** (read/low-impact autonomous, high-impact gated); Istio circuit breakers, retry/backoff, bulkheads and degraded mode (NFR-A-003, PRIN 2); RFC 9315 compliance-assessment loop (IntentReport.reportState) for drift detection; constrained agent role bounds the action space (FR-007).
controlFields.Privacy & Security: **Binding under PDPA 2010 (am. 2024)** — full compliance assessment in `ARC-001-PDPA-v1.0` (7 DPP, DPO, 72h breach notification, risk-based cross-border). PII masking in logs/telemetry (FR-009, NFR-C-001); zero-trust identity + least privilege (PRIN 4, ADR-001); Malaysia-resident RESTRICTED data; secrets vault-only; CAMARA credentials never coupled to commercial identity (ADR-001).
controlFields.Inclusiveness: B2B operator-tooling context (network engineers, service designers) rather than direct citizen interface — accessibility/digital-divide exposure is indirect. Open-core (Apache 2.0) framework lowers barrier to scrutiny and reuse.
controlFields.Transparency: **Strong.** Every autonomous tool call emits **GenAI semantic-convention (`gen_ai.*`)**, **AI-gateway (`ai_gateway.*`)** and **RFC 9315 phase (`rfc9315.phase`)** telemetry carrying the acting identity and correlation/intent ID (FR-011, BR-005, UC006). Meta-observability of agent behaviour is an explicit product principle (PRIN 5). UC-003 review journey lets a reviewer obtain an attributable, phase-tagged trace per intent. Open-core repo + CLAUDE.md make the design legible.
controlFields.Accountability: **Strong.** **Constrained least-privilege agent-role identity** for every autonomous cycle — distinct OAuth2 client-credentials `agent` realm role, deny-by-default scopes, never a human/admin identity (FR-007, ADR-001; commit `a9da9d4`). Acting identity carried in audit logs **and** telemetry spans (NFR-C-002); 100%-attributable-tool-call target. Named owners per risk; EARB escalation path.
controlFields.Pursuit of Human Benefit & Wellbeing: Purpose is faster, auditable, lower-error network service provisioning — reduces manual engineering toil and time-to-service (BR-002) while keeping humans in control of high-impact change. Autonomy is deliberately bounded (the differentiator is *trustworthy* autonomy, not unbounded automation).

ARC-001-DPIA-v1.0.title: Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA)
ARC-001-DPIA-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Document Type: Data Protection Impact Assessment (PDPA 2010 am. 2024; UK GDPR Art. 35 structure)
controlFields.Review Cycle: 12 months (or on material change, breach, or JPDP guidance update)
controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Reviewed By: [PENDING — Vpnet DPO (to be appointed); operator DPO per engagement]
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, Security/Compliance, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), operator Compliance Officers / DPOs
controlFields.Data Protection Officer (Vpnet, processo: [PENDING — to be appointed + notified to JPDP]
controlFields.PDPA 2010 (am. 2024): Malaysia Personal Data Protection Act 2010 [Act 709], as amended by the Personal Data Protection (Amendment) Act 2024 — the binding instrument for this DPIA.
controlFields.JPDP: Jabatan Perlindungan Data Peribadi (Personal Data Protection Department) — Malaysia's data-protection supervisory authority (not the UK ICO).
controlFields.DS-009: The RESTRICTED-tier subscriber personal-data dataset (`customerId` + intent text) per `ARC-001-MYCLAS-v1.0`.
controlFields.Data Controller: The operator (U Mobile / TM) that determines the purposes/means of processing its subscribers' data.
controlFields.Data Processor: Vpnet/ibn-core, processing personal data on the operator's instruction.
controlFields.PII masking (FR-009): Fail-closed middleware masking subscriber PII before AI/downstream processing; masking failure blocks processing.
controlFields.PDP Guideline 03/2025: The PDPA risk-based cross-border transfer regime (replaced the former whitelist).
controlFields.O2C: Order-to-Cash — the canonical natural-language-intent-to-fulfilment use case.
controlFields.DPO: Data Protection Officer — mandatory from 1 June 2025 for controllers and processors under the 2024 amendment.
controlFields.HITL: Human-in-the-loop — human gating of high-impact autonomous actions.
controlFields.UK GDPR / ICO: Referenced only for the DPIA **structure**; not the binding instrument here.

ARC-001-MYCLAS-v1.0.title: Commercial Data-Sensitivity Classification Register
ARC-001-MYCLAS-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia)
controlFields.PUBLIC: Intended for unrestricted public release; disclosure causes no harm.
controlFields.INTERNAL: Non-public operational data; limited business impact if disclosed; not personal data and not operator-secret.
controlFields.CONFIDENTIAL: Operator-confidential commercial / network data; disclosure harms an operator's competitive or security posture.
controlFields.RESTRICTED: Highest sensitivity: subscriber personal data (PDPA 2010) and secrets / credentials; disclosure causes serious legal, regulatory, or security harm.

ARC-001-MYDIG-v1.0.title: MyDIGITAL National Priorities Alignment Statement
ARC-001-MYDIG-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia)
controlFields.2. Boost economic competitiveness: Digitalise businesses; grow digital-economy GDP; build local tech champions; deep-tech IP
controlFields.3. Build enabling digital infrastructure: National 5G rollout; quality, reliable, affordable connectivity; cloud infrastructure
controlFields.4. Build an agile, competent digital tal: Grow 4IR/AI talent; deep-tech and agentic-AI skills; local capability
controlFields.5. Create an inclusive digital society: JENDELA connectivity; bridge the digital divide; affordable access
controlFields.Inclusion (Thrust 5) contribution is ind: Cannot claim JENDELA / digital-divide impact credibly without operator-mediated data
controlFields.No public-sector reuse path articulated: MyDIGITAL's flagship public-sector-transformation thrust is largely untouched
controlFields.Local-talent contribution relies on open: Thrust 4 benefit is potential, not realised
controlFields.MyDigital ID / national digital-identity: A national-identity touchpoint MyDIGITAL emphasises is absent (ibn-core uses operator Keycloak identity, by design per `my-operator` recipe)
controlFields.Affordability KPI dependence on operator: ibn-core enables but does not control affordability outcomes

ARC-001-NCII-v1.0.title: Cyber Security Act 2024 / NACSA NCII Statement of Applicability
ARC-001-NCII-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.) — accountable; Security Lead — control owner

controlFields.Document Type: NACSA NCII Statement of Applicability (Cyber Security Act 2024)
controlFields.Review Cycle: Annual (minimum; re-run on material architecture change or new operator engagement)
controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.) — accountable; Security Lead — control owner
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery + Security/Compliance, operator NCII/security teams (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), operator-side NACSA liaison
controlFields.Instrument cited: Cyber Security Act 2024 [Act 854] + subsidiary regulations (NACSA); cross-ref PDPA 2010 (am. 2024)
controlFields.Hosting / placement: Hybrid — operator private cloud + Malaysian-region public CSP per dataset tier (ADR-002 / ADR-003)
controlFields.NCII sector (if applicable): Communications (telecommunications) — operator is the NCII entity; ibn-core is an in-scope vendor component
controlFields.NCII risk assessment: Operator must conduct an NCII cyber risk assessment and provide it to NACSA; ibn-core must supply its component risk posture (this project's `ARC-001-RISK-v1.0`, esp. R-005) as an input.
controlFields.Cybersecurity audit: On NACSA direction, the NCII's systems are audited; ibn-core must be auditable — provide architecture, controls evidence, conformance artefacts (`docs/compliance/`, this SoA, SECD).
controlFields.Code-of-practice compliance: Comply with the NACSA **Communications-sector code of practice** controls applicable to NCII; ibn-core implements/maps the controls in the SoA below.
controlFields.Cybersecurity exercise: Participate in NACSA-directed exercises / drills; ibn-core supplies incident-response runbooks (NFR-M-003) and degraded-mode behaviour (NFR-A-003) for the operator's exercise scope.
controlFields.Incident notification to NACSA: Notify the sector lead + NACSA Chief Executive of a cybersecurity incident — **initial report within 6 hours**, **full report within 14 days**. ibn-core must detect and escalate to the operator fast enough to meet the operator's 6-hour clock.
controlFields.NACSA licensing (cybersecurity service p: Required only if **providing a licensable cybersecurity service** (e.g. managed SOC, pen-testing as a service). **Not applicable** to ibn-core as shipped — it is an IBN orchestration product, not a cybersecurity service provider. Re-assess if Vpnet offers managed security services around it.

ARC-001-OPS-v1.0.title: Operational Readiness Pack
ARC-001-OPS-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.) — accountable; SRE Lead — operational owner

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect / CTO (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.) — accountable; SRE Lead — operational owner
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery + SRE, Security/Compliance, operator network + NCII/security teams (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), operator-side NACSA/JPDP liaison
controlFields.Description: AI-native RFC 9315 / TMF921 v5.0.0 framework translating natural-language customer intent into orchestrated changes against a Malaysian operator's live 4G/5G core, OSS/BSS and network configuration
controlFields.Business Criticality: High — orchestrates national telecommunications critical infrastructure (NCII Communications sector)
controlFields.Service Owner: Lead Architect / CTO, Vpnet Cloud Solutions [PENDING named]
controlFields.Unsafe Agent Action: high-impact network-mutating action without HITL approval, or agent tool call lacking agent-role identity
controlFields.DR Strategy: Active-Passive, **region-local** (in-Malaysia) backup-restore + replica promotion (alpha); operator-contracted at production
controlFields.Primary Site: Malaysian-region public CSP / operator private cloud (per ADR-002 hybrid topology)
controlFields.DR Site: Second in-region availability zone / operator DR site (residency-constrained — RESTRICTED PII stays Malaysia-resident, ADR-003)
controlFields.RTO: **≤ 4 hours** (alpha, NFR-A-002); per operator contract at production
controlFields.RPO: **≤ 15 minutes** (alpha, NFR-A-002); per operator contract at production
controlFields.Replication: Redis SSoT async replication, lag < 15 min; Keycloak realm config in IaC/Git

ARC-001-ADR-001-v1.0.title: Architecture Decision Record: Operator Identity via Keycloak as Central IdP with Distinct Constrained Agent Role and CAMARA-Native Egress Authentication
ARC-001-ADR-001-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners, Security Lead
controlFields.Phase 1: Preparation: Define `agent` role scopes, assurance tiers, token TTLs; realm/client setup
controlFields.Phase 2: Implementation: Agent client-credentials bootstrap; thread identity through `McpAdapter`; vault CAMARA creds
controlFields.Phase 3: Validation: Auth unit/integration/security tests; privilege-escalation negative tests
controlFields.Phase 4: Deployment: Roll into alpha; wire telemetry identity attribute; runbooks

ARC-001-ADR-003-v1.0.title: Architecture Decision Record: Data Residency per Commercial Data-Sensitivity Classification — Tier-Differentiated Residency Keyed to the MYCLAS Ladder
ARC-001-ADR-003-v1.0.owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)

controlFields.Owner: Roland Pfeifer, Lead Architect (Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd.)
controlFields.Distribution: ibn-core engineering, Vpnet SI delivery teams, operator integration partners (U Mobile, TM Malaysia), Security Lead, Operator Compliance Officer
controlFields.Phase 1: Encode rules: Express the DS-001…DS-010 residency table as IaC parameters + policy guardrails on the ADR-002 blueprint
controlFields.Phase 2: Verification: Release-time placement-audit check (no CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED in public estate; DS-009 Malaysia-resident); masking fail-closed test
controlFields.Phase 3: Worksheet: Per-engagement placement worksheet (INTERNAL region choice, telemetry endpoint, PDPA opt-in gate)
controlFields.Phase 4: Per-engagement: Instantiate residency rules per operator; obtain PDPA/DPIA sign-off where cross-border opt-in requested
controlFields.Governance Board: Vpnet EA Review Board (joint with operator forum)
